anti_bot_detection_results.browser_use_response: Agent detected challenge but could not complete verification
anti_bot_detection_results.recommendation: Requires residential proxies, fingerprint randomization, or CAPTCHA solving service

sites_not_tested.reason: Test interrupted due to walmart.com timeout

browser_use_stealth.notes: Built-in uBlock Origin and cookie extensions did not prevent detection

proxy_rotation.potential_effectiveness: High - Would rotate fingerprints and IPs

residential_proxies.potential_effectiveness: High - Residential IPs less likely to trigger challenges

headless_detection_bypass.notes: Browser-use has disable_security option but not enabled in test

conclusion.anti_bot_resistance: LOW - Major e-commerce sites immediately detect and block browser-use
conclusion.recommendation: AI scraper must implement fallback chain: AI → Traditional → Manual
